title: HTML Head Element
content:
### The HTML `<head>` Element

The `<head>` section contains **metadata** -- information about the page.

---

### What Goes in `<head>`?

| Element | Purpose |
|---------|---------|
| `<title>` | Page title (shows in browser tab) |
| `<meta>` | Metadata (charset, description, viewport) |
| `<link>` | External resources (CSS, favicon) |
| `<style>` | Internal CSS |
| `<script>` | JavaScript (can also go in body) |
| `<base>` | Base URL for relative links |

---

### The `<title>` Element

```html
<head>
  <title>My Website - Home</title>
</head>
```

The title is used for:
- Browser tab name
- Search engine result title
- Bookmark name

---

### The `<meta>` Element

```html
<!-- Character encoding -->
<meta charset="UTF-8">

<!-- Viewport for responsive design -->
<meta name="viewport"
      content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">

<!-- Page description (for search results) -->
<meta name="description"
      content="Learn HTML with this free tutorial">

<!-- Keywords (not used by Google, but still valid) -->
<meta name="keywords"
      content="HTML, tutorial, web development">

<!-- Author -->
<meta name="author" content="John Doe">

<!-- Refresh/redirect after 30 seconds -->
<meta http-equiv="refresh" content="30;url=https://example.com">
```

---

### Open Graph (Social Media)

```html
<meta property="og:title" content="My Page">
<meta property="og:description" content="Awesome content">
<meta property="og:image" content="image.jpg">
<meta property="og:url" content="https://example.com">
```

---

### Standard Head Setup

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>Page Title</title>
  <meta name="description" content="Page description">
  <link rel="icon" href="favicon.ico">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="style.css">
</head>
```

> **Best Practice:** Always include both `charset` and `viewport` meta tags. They are essential for modern web development.
codeExample: Hello, World!

quiz.question: Which meta tag is essential for responsive design?
